project.title: Agriope Proteins from 2D-Gel and LC-ESI
project.projectDescription: Agriope Proteins from 2D-Gel and LC-ESI-MS approach
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: 2D-Gel, Tryptic digest, MALDI-TOF-MS, DB-search direct digtest with trypsin, LC-ESI-MS, DB-search
project.dataProcessingProtocol: FlexAnalysis, MASCOT DB-Search ProteomeDiscoverer, MASCOT DB-Search

submitters.title: Mr

submitters.name: Günter Lochnit

labPIs.title: Dr

labPIs.name: Günter Lochnit

references.referenceLine: Lüddecke T, Reumont BMV, Förster F, Billion A, Timm T, Lochnit G, Vilcinskas A, Lemke S. An Economic Dilemma Between Molecular Weapon Systems May Explain an Arachno-atypical Venom in Wasp Spiders (Argiope bruennichi). Biomolecules. 2020 10(7)

Characteristics[OrganismPart]: Venom glands were dissected from 14 female A. bruennichi specimens, and the venom was extracted and set aside for proteomic analysis.
Characteristics[Specimen]: The crude venom set aside prior to RNA extraction was first fractionated by 1D-PAGE.
Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic: Fourteen A. bruennichi adult females were collected in September 2018 in Gießen, Germany (N 50.5729555°, E 8.7280508°).
Characteristics[PooledSample]: The venom glands and remaining body tissues were separately pooled
before pooling the supernatants for lyophilization.
Characteristics[Sex]: Venom glands were dissected from 14 female A. bruennichi specimens
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: digested with trypsin at a 50:1 ratio for 16 h at 37 °C.
Characteristics[ReductionReagent]: Cysteines were reduced with 5-mM DTT for 30 min at 50 °C
Characteristics[AlkylationReagent]: modified with 10-mM iodacetamide for 30 min at 24 °C.
for 15 min in the same solution containing 200-mM iodacetamide.
Comment[Instrument]: Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid MS (Thermo Fisher Scientific, MA, USA)
Comment[Separation]: Thermo Fisher Scientific UltiMate 3000RSLCnano device (MA, USA)
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: A precursor ion mass tolerance of 10 ppm was applied.
Comment[FragmentMassTolerance]: Fragment ion mass tolerance was set to 0.8 Da for the linear ion trap MS2 detection.
Comment[GradientTime]: a 3–44% linear gradient of acetonitrile over 240 min
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: one missed cleavage site was allowed.
